entries.reference: Abalang nen Sami amay aso nen Layla.
Panon to inatey so anak to?
Say China et baleg nen say Japan.
Si Tom et baleg nen siak.
Say China et baleg nen say Japan.
Say Tokyo et baleg nen say Yokohama.

entries.source: When did you login on Facebook?
You said you were working tomorrow.
China is much bigger than Japan.
entries.reference: Say China et mas baleg nen say Japan.

entries.source: The door bolts on the inside.
My father's mother is my grandma.
entries.reference: Say ina nen amak et si baik.

entries.source: I told them not to give up.
entries.reference: Imbagak ed sikaran ag ira onsuko.

entries.source: Tigers are bigger and stronger than cats.
entries.reference: Saray tigri et baleg tan mabiskeg nen saray pusa.

entries.source: His happiness is bigger than his intellect.
entries.reference: Say kaliketan ko et baleg nen say talino to.

entries.source: At what time will I see you?
All you had to do was ask.
entries.reference: Say gawaen mo labat et nantepet.

entries.source: China is twenty times bigger than Japan.
entries.reference: Say China duamplo ya aminpigan baleg nen say Japan.

entries.source: The eye is bigger than the belly.
entries.reference: Say mata et baleg nen say eges.

entries.source: That box is bigger than this one.
entries.reference: Aman a kahon et baleg nen saya.

entries.source: No other dog is bigger than this.
entries.reference: Anggapo so arun ya aso so baleg nen saya.

entries.source: I lost the keys to the house again.
entries.reference: Abalang ko lalamet may tombok na abong.

entries.source: He came to London by way of Siberia.
entries.reference: Sikato so sinmabi ed London a dinmalan ed Siberia.

entries.source: Don't worry. I'll take care of that.
They don't want a woman for that position.
entries.reference: Agda labay so bii ed satan ya betang.

entries.source: He was very tall and slim, with long arms and legs.
entries.reference: Sikato et atagey tan mayapis, walaan na andukey iran taklay tan bitking.

entries.source: They did not feel the earthquake, because they were asleep when it happened.
entries.reference: Ag da alikas may yegyeg, ta nanaogep ira nen agawa man.

entries.source: People that have experienced so-called 'lucid dreams' often describe them as being 'more real than reality'. They also describe reality after waking up from a 'lucid dream' to be like a 'whimsical dream'.
entries.reference: Saray totoon naantaan da so tatawagen a 'malinew iran kugkugip' mabetbet idalatdat da iraya bilang 'matua ni nen say katuaan'. Idadalatdat da met kabangon da manlapu ed 'malinew a kugip' a singa iya 'pangis a kugip'.
